languages.text: {n}Как бы вы не старались, избежать уколов шипов не удается. Вы чувствуете, как они находят щели в вашей броне и жадно впиваются в плоть. Проколы тут же начинают гореть — похоже, растение ядовито.{/n}

{n}Despite your best efforts, you fail to avoid the spikes. You can feel them finding gaps in your armour and hungrily digging into your flesh. The puncture wounds immediately start to burn — the plant seems to be poisonous.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Как бы вы не старались, избежать уколов шипов не удается. Вы чувствуете, как они находят щели в вашей броне и жадно впиваются в плоть. Проколы тут же начинают гореть — похоже, растение ядовито.{/n}

{n}Despite your best efforts, you fail to avoid the spikes. You can feel them finding gaps in your armour and hungrily digging into your flesh. The puncture wounds immediately start to burn — the plant seems to be poisonous.{/n}

{n}Despite your best efforts, you fail to avoid the spikes. You can feel them finding gaps in your armour and hungrily digging into your flesh. The puncture wounds immediately start to burn — the plant seems to be poisonous.{/n}

languages.text: {n}どんなに頑張っても、トゲを避けることはできなかった。鎧の隙間を突いて、肉を貪り食う。刺された傷はすぐに燃え始める。この植物は毒を持っているようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Despite your best efforts, you fail to avoid the spikes. You can feel them finding gaps in your armour and hungrily digging into your flesh. The puncture wounds immediately start to burn — the plant seems to be poisonous.{/n}

traits.locale_text: どんなに頑張っても、トゲを避けることはできなかった。鎧の隙間を突いて、肉を貪り食う。刺された傷はすぐに燃え始める。この植物は毒を持っているようだ。

languages.text: {n}Tüm çabalarına rağmen dikenlerden kaçınamıyorsun. Zırhındaki boşlukları bulduklarını ve açgözlülükle etine saplandıklarını hissedebiliyorsun. Delinen yaralar, hemen yanmaya başlıyor. Bitki, zehirli gibi görünüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Despite your best efforts, you fail to avoid the spikes. You can feel them finding gaps in your armour and hungrily digging into your flesh. The puncture wounds immediately start to burn — the plant seems to be poisonous.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tüm çabalarına rağmen dikenlerden kaçınamıyorsun. Zırhındaki boşlukları bulduklarını ve açgözlülükle etine saplandıklarını hissedebiliyorsun. Delinen yaralar, hemen yanmaya başlıyor. Bitki, zehirli gibi görünüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}A pesar de tus esfuerzos, no consigues evitar las espinas. Puedes sentir cómo encuentran los huecos en tu armadura para hundirse vorazmente en tu carne. Las perforaciones empiezan a arder de inmediato: esta planta es venenosa.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Despite your best efforts, you fail to avoid the spikes. You can feel them finding gaps in your armour and hungrily digging into your flesh. The puncture wounds immediately start to burn — the plant seems to be poisonous.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}A pesar de tus esfuerzos, no consigues evitar las espinas. Puedes sentir cómo encuentran los huecos en tu armadura para hundirse vorazmente en tu carne. Las perforaciones empiezan a arder de inmediato: esta planta es venenosa.{/n}

languages.text: {n}尽管拼尽全力，可你还是没能避开那些尖刺。你能感觉到它们通过你盔甲上的缝隙，贪婪地钻进你的血肉之中。刺伤处立刻变得火烧火燎——这种植物似乎有毒。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Despite your best efforts, you fail to avoid the spikes. You can feel them finding gaps in your armour and hungrily digging into your flesh. The puncture wounds immediately start to burn — the plant seems to be poisonous.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}尽管拼尽全力，可你还是没能避开那些尖刺。你能感觉到它们通过你盔甲上的缝隙，贪婪地钻进你的血肉之中。刺伤处立刻变得火烧火燎——这种植物似乎有毒。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Malgré vos efforts, vous ne parvenez pas à éviter les épines. Vous les sentez se glisser dans les interstices de votre armure et s'enfoncer avidement dans votre chair. La sensation de brûlure que les blessures provoquent immédiatement laisse à penser que la plante est vénéneuse.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Despite your best efforts, you fail to avoid the spikes. You can feel them finding gaps in your armour and hungrily digging into your flesh. The puncture wounds immediately start to burn — the plant seems to be poisonous.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Malgré vos efforts, vous ne parvenez pas à éviter les épines. Vous les sentez se glisser dans les interstices de votre armure et s'enfoncer avidement dans votre chair. La sensation de brûlure que les blessures provoquent immédiatement laisse à penser que la plante est vénéneuse.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Es gelingt dir trotz aller Bemühungen nicht, den Stacheln zu entgehen. Du spürst, wie sie deine Rüstung durchdringen und sich hungrig in dein Fleisch bohren. Die Wunden beginnen auf der Stelle zu brennen ... die Pflanze scheint giftig zu sein.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Despite your best efforts, you fail to avoid the spikes. You can feel them finding gaps in your armour and hungrily digging into your flesh. The puncture wounds immediately start to burn — the plant seems to be poisonous.{/n}
